form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 7 at Sanliurfa on March 30 over 1900m, 24 len behind Aslan Hatip carrying 56kg at $29.75. form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 11th of 14 at this track on April 8 over 1200m, 36 len behind Nazli Berra carrying 61.5kg at $21.20.
